specific_question: How much did the overall efficiency in the braking system increase in the new Taurus 3S model and what impact did it have on safety ratings?
answer: The product engineering team recorded a 13% increase in the braking system efficiency of the Elexion Taurus 3S model compared to its previous generation car. In turn, this improvement increased the model's overall Motor Vehicle Safety Oversight Program safety score by 0.5 points in 2017.
dr_question: How can Elexion Automotive ensure product compliance with CARB's 100% ZEV sales mandate by 2035 in California?
